description_long: This is a compact, rectangular wooden drawer unit with a single pull-out drawer, finished in a light beige color. The drawer features a small, round knob handle at the center of its front face, allowing for easy opening and closing. The main body is box-shaped, with clean, straight edges and a flat top surface suitable for placing small items. The drawer is fully extended in the images, revealing a spacious, empty interior with smooth, matching surfaces. The construction appears sturdy, with visible seams and joints at the corners, suggesting a solid build. This type of drawer is commonly found as a freestanding piece of furniture in urban environments, such as offices, garages, or residential entryways.
description: A light beige, rectangular wooden drawer unit with a single pull-out drawer and a round knob handle. The design is simple, sturdy, and functional, suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer fully open, revealing the empty interior and the round knob handle.
description_view_1: Side view with the drawer extended, displaying the thickness of the drawer front and the seamless side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid back panel and the drawer partially visible above the main body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the drawer extended, mirroring the features of the other side.
